name: Halloween Bee Cat Costume - Hyde and EEK! Boutique™ One Size Fits Most
description:
Your kitty will look cute as can be wearing the Halloween Bee Cat Costume from Hyde and EEK! Boutique™. This cat headwear piece has a bee design for a standout look. Crafted with a hook and loop closure head.

Hyde and EEK! Boutique™: Thrilling delights. Curious oddities.
